sets.title: Organic Watercolor Storyworld
sets.styleDirection: hand-painted watercolor storyworld with soft brush texture, natural gradients, and emotionally warm scenes
sets.palette: honey gold, moss green, powder blue, and coral accents
sets.composition: curved organic flow, layered depth haze, gentle pathways and open breathing room
sets.lighting: diffuse golden-hour sunlight with low contrast shadows

sets.title: Neon Future STEM City
sets.styleDirection: futuristic cinematic STEM cityscape with clean architectural lines, holographic motifs, and dynamic atmosphere
sets.palette: electric cyan, magenta, deep navy, and chrome highlights
sets.composition: strong perspective lines, parallax depth, and deliberate focal hierarchy
sets.lighting: night scene with neon rim lighting and volumetric fog

sets.title: Minimal Geometric Editorial
sets.styleDirection: bold editorial illustration using geometric forms, minimal detail density, and premium publication-style framing
sets.palette: sand, terracotta, muted teal, charcoal, and warm cream
sets.composition: asymmetric balance, large negative space, and disciplined shape language
sets.lighting: soft studio lighting with clean tonal separation

sets.title: Tactile Papercraft Collage
sets.styleDirection: layered paper-cut collage aesthetic with tactile edges, stacked shapes, and handcrafted dimensionality
sets.palette: playful primaries with warm neutral paper tones
sets.composition: layered planes, cast paper shadows, and clear visual landmarks
sets.lighting: softbox overhead with subtle paper depth shadows
